repos_pt:
[md-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse) - Rust Programa em Rust para montar arquivos markdown para diversas línguas. Para a versão em Python acesse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse-py

[Rust-Random-Stuff](https://github.com/caiocampos/Rust-Random-Stuff) - Rust Projetos variados em Rust

[blog-posts](https://github.com/caiocampos/blog-posts) - TypeScript Página de postagens usando React, NestJS (Express) e MongoDB (Mongoose)
repos_en:
[md-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse) - Rust Rust program to mount markdown files for several languages. For Python version access: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse-py

[Rust-Random-Stuff](https://github.com/caiocampos/Rust-Random-Stuff) - Rust Miscellaneous projects in Rust

[blog-posts](https://github.com/caiocampos/blog-posts) - TypeScript Post page using React, NestJS (Express) and MongoDB (Mongoose)
repos_es:

[Rust-Random-Stuff](https://github.com/caiocampos/Rust-Random-Stuff) - Rust Proyectos variados en Rust
